description_long: This object is a vintage Apple Macintosh computer monitor, characterized by its boxy, off-white plastic enclosure and integrated CRT display. The front features a slightly recessed, square glass screen with a thick, molded bezel and a small, colorful Apple logo at the bottom left. Below the screen is a horizontal slot, likely for a floppy disk drive, and a rectangular vent or speaker grille. The sides and top are adorned with prominent ventilation slats, while the rear panel includes a handle recess, various ports, a power socket, and a label. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on function, typical of early personal computers. The monitor's surface appears matte and slightly textured, with subtle signs of wear and age.
description: A vintage Apple Macintosh computer monitor with a boxy, off-white plastic body, thick bezel, and integrated CRT display. Features include a front Apple logo, ventilation slats, and rear ports.
description_view_0: Front view showing the square CRT screen, thick bezel, Apple logo, floppy disk slot, and a horizontal vent below the display.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the plain, off-white panel with vertical ventilation slats at the top and bottom.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing the recessed handle, multiple ports, power socket, product label, and additional ventilation slats.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with a plain panel and vertical ventilation slats at the top and bottom.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thick, molded from off-white plastic, with rounded corners and a slightly recessed profile. It has a matte, slightly textured finish and frames the display area with a utilitarian, retro aesthetic.
attribute_stand_type: The monitor has an integrated flat base as part of its enclosure, with no separate stand or visible adjustability features. The base is rectangular and made of the same off-white plastic as the body.
attribute_button_placement: A single power button is implied on the rear panel, with no visible buttons on the front or sides.
attribute_port_visibility: Visible on the rear panel, including multiple ports and a power socket.
attribute_brand_logo: A small, colorful Apple logo is present at the bottom left of the front bezel.
